---
title: "Joseph Paul"

image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

This is the contents of the about page for my blog.
Hello, my name is Joseph Paul. I am a PhD researcher at Heriot-Watt University studying Economics.

My research is princiappally focused on the economics of algorithm and machine learning bias. I am also interested in numerical methods generally and bayesian econometrics.
